mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'PUBLISHED' AND visibility = 'PUBLIC'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND type = 'ARTICLE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'PENDING'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND type = 'MESSAGE'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(view_count), 0) FROM site_visit_daily WHERE stat_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 29 DAY
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(unique_count), 0) FROM site_visit_daily WHERE stat_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 29 DAY
SELECT stat_date AS date, view_count AS views, unique_count AS visitors FROM site_visit_daily WHERE stat_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 29 DAY ORDER BY stat_date

SELECT id, title, slug, view_count AS views, like_count AS likes, comment_count AS comments FROM article WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY (view_count + like_count * 3 + comment_count * 5) DESC, published_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
